entities.name: PUCCINIA ARACHIDIS
entities.description: Fungal pathogen that produces uredospores on peanut leaves

entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: The host plant Arachis hypogaea used in the study

entities.name: UREDOSPORE PRODUCTION
entities.description: The amount of uredospores produced per unit leaf area and per unit pustule area

entities.name: GERMINABILITY
entities.description: The ability of uredospores to germinate

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The capacity of peanut genotypes to limit the production and germinability of uredospores

entities.name: HOST GENOTYPE
entities.description: The genetic makeup of the peanut plant which influences the pathogen's development

entities.name: INOCULATED DETACHED LEAVES
entities.description: The experimental approach of using detached leaves for inoculation to study fungal growth

relationships.description: used as a method to study
